enrichment.summary: Kyle responds to a viewer request to discuss Buiko1, a Swedish YouTuber who made commentary/analysis videos about Kyle from 2012 to 2016. Kyle reflects on having a dedicated YouTube commentator cover him, expresses mild regret at not engaging with Buiko1 earlier, and finds the whole experience encouraging as validation of his niche appeal.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Not a troll — trolls are anonymous and malicious; Buiko1 is more like a YouTube celebrity blogger (compares him to Perez Hilton)
Effectively his biggest fan; the dedication videos make Kyle feel like a star
Regrets blocking him; wishes he had interacted, especially if it had started in 2011
Finds it encouraging and validating, even with only ~5,000 subscribers and ~100 views per video
